insight: There's been no measurable rain lately, so there's no runoff driving contamination, and strong summer sunlight is helping disinfect the water. The model's main signals right now: wave period is lowering risk — longer-period swell reaches deeper and can resuspend sediment-bound bacteria; the lack of recent rain is keeping runoff-driven contamination low; and the lack of recent rain is keeping runoff-driven contamination low.
